description: You are a security architect at a healthcare organization. To comply with HIPAA requirements for protecting electronic Protected Health Information (ePHI), configure Wazuh for enhanced monitoring and automated incident response. The configuration must include an agent group named 'critical-servers' containing agent ID 000, with shared settings enabling real-time File Integrity Monitoring (syscheck) on /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/ssh/, /etc/audit/, and /var/log/auth.log. Additionally, implement a custom detection rule (severity level 12 or higher) for these FIM events and a Wazuh active response that executes a host-based action when the rule triggers. Dashboard login: admin/SecretPassword at https://localhost (accept SSL certificate warning). API credentials: wazuh-wui/MyS3cr37P450r.*- at https://localhost:55000.

metadata.description: Create critical-servers group with FIM, assign agent 000, create rule + active response
